AI Summary

✨ Category Highlights Generated by MediaLens AI

The Jewellery, Watches & Luxury Products category was highly active across Hong Kong & Macau this period, with 19,716 pieces of content driving 17.6M engagements and 224.7M video views. Combined estimated ad value reached HK$342.3M, and each piece of content averaged 1,127 engagements — signalling strong audience appetite for luxury storytelling in the market.

Key Takeaways
Sa Sa International commanded the largest share of category activity, followed by Blackmores and Chanel — retail and heritage luxury names are setting the pace.
Video remained the dominant format, contributing the bulk of the 224.7M views — a clear cue to prioritise short-form video in upcoming campaigns.
The high average engagement (1,127 per content) points to receptive, high-intent audiences worth re-targeting for BOFU conversion pushes.
Ad value of HK$342.3M reflects heavy competitive investment — differentiated creative and timing will be key to standing out.
